content_body: Thank you for taking the time to create such a wonderful and inviting space for families. We were able to come to this mountain hideaway with our entire family, including brother, sisters, in-laws, grandparents and grandchildren. The memories will remain with us for a lifetime. The attention to detail in the cabin made our experience delightful and we are regretful that we have to return home so soon! Regardless we will take our memories with us and we are happy to have shared this special time in a space that you have created. I am sure we will be back. The family really enjoyed the movie room. The jacuzzi was relaxing for the adults. The outside grill area provided great moments of entertainment! Thank you.
title: Taking Our North Georgia Memories Home
